sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98404" key="summetaxwre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμμετα-χωρέω</orth>, <sense id="n98404.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change position with</tr_>, c. dat., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg008:152:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">152.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
